bracu_official.title: BRAC University, BANGLACRAFT sign MoU to strengthen Bangladesh's handicraft sector
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University and BANGLACRAFT have signed a Memorandum of Understanding to collaborate on strengthening Bangladesh's handicraft sector, aiming to foster its development.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University holds workshop on innovation and intellectual property
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University organized a workshop focused on innovation and intellectual property, providing insights and fostering discussion on these crucial topics.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University welcomes three new members to its Board of Trustees
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University has announced the appointment of three new members to its Board of Trustees, bringing fresh perspectives and expertise to the leadership.

bracu_official.title: Admission Test Results Notice, Fall 2026
bracu_official.summary: A notice regarding the admission test results for the Fall 2026 semester has been published, providing important information for prospective students.

bracu_official.title: Mid-Term Exam schedule, Summer 2026
bracu_official.summary: The official schedule for the Mid-Term Examinations of the Summer 2026 semester has been released for students.

bracu_official.title: Public Reporting on Contract Signing – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD2
bracu_official.summary: An announcement has been made regarding the public reporting on the contract signing for project B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD2.

bracu_official.title: Public Reporting on Contract Signing – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD1
bracu_official.summary: Public reporting on the contract signing for project B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD1 has been announced to stakeholders.

bracu_official.title: Eid-e-Miladun Nabi*-University closed
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University will be closed on August 26th in observance of Eid-e-Miladun Nabi, a public holiday.
